violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Big ice machine and coke ice bin need descaled. -Clean nozzle on ice cream dispenser.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean above fry warmer and shelving above main hand wash sink.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floor edges need more thorough cleaning.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)

Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
